dsl_rule.translation_notes: Pattern 'Below the Stomach': (1) Tall white candle detected via body > ATR (volatility-adjusted); (2) Next candle opens lower than prior close; (3) Next candle closes below midpoint of prior candle body (approximated as close < pivot). Exit when price recovers above SMA_20 or bulls regain control. Behavioral rank 20/103 in bear markets suggests moderate reliability; success_rate_bull 60% noted. Exit conditions were AUTHOR_SILENT so reversal-based exit logic applied.

source_rule_text: Pattern name: Below the Stomach. A tall white candle in an uptrend followed by a candle that opens lower and stays below the midpoint of the white candle's body.
